title: Escape From the Chateau
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Pudding, Reiju, Unknown person #12 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...This is bad...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that it was a good idea to steer her away, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if she takes down the straw hats, there's no cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When she comes back, it'll be the end of me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...but we managed to earn some time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we are unable to make a cake during that time, it'll be the end of this island too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...No, it's impossible. Think about it, smoothie...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...even with head chef streusen, how many days do you think it took to make that cake!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there are no more of those "mythical" ingredients that we stole and gathered from other countries!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one in charge of making it is unconscious!!...there's no way to make the cake!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...Furthermore, the most troublesome thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that Mama didn't even get to eat a single bite of that cake...perorn}

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's "The delicious cake that is filled with Mama's fantasies that she didn't get to eat".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...then, this time's "sweet theme" is!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that kind of thing... exactly who from where can make it!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad... at the very least...this island will be destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What happens after that is "unknown"....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Remember someone in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shall I help you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Pudding!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wedding cake this time will be a chocolate chiffon cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's the taste of the chocolate we're talking about, I won't lose to even the head chef!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah, pudding- same!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and sister Chiffon is an expert on Chiffon cakes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's the two of us, we can make the cake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Really, pudding!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, right now, Chiffon is the wife of our enemy, Bege!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh, she'll definitely listen to me in

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: She appeared! It's evil pudding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cuck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So evil!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...truthfully, the ingredients we need this time are at the entrance of our territory, in chocolat town on cocoa Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For now, we must gather the ingredients there...!! As for the "mythical ingredients", there are actually some in reserve.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brother Peros, after Mama destroys the straw hats...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Direct her to chocolate town! I will subdue her!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: You really saved us there, pudding!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: I, who was disagreed by Sanji...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What... Beautiful eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If she gets rid of them for me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will have to reward her, at least...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hurry, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pursuers will be coming here soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't talk all high and mighty while riding on jinbe's back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hah... hah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine, since Nam-san is so cute:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm cute and weak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cutting through here is the shortest way out of the seducing woods.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we have to go through these woods again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Will we be all right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ah! What's that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OW ON OWNOW...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you all right, kin-chan?*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They will close up very soon- ©

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
